blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,035 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
